title: Automation - Recurring
excerpt:

posts.author: renato.rosa (Renato Rosa)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am creating an accounts payable project in monday, having among the launches accounts that are recurring and that expire every 20th of each month.

For these accounts to be automatically inserted in the project month by month, I see that the appropriate automation would be “Every time period, create an item”.

I ask: How can these recurring accounts be launched immediately for indeterminate amounts of months?

… It is a way of visualizing and forecasting accounts payable in future months.

Appreciate !

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @renato.rosa, if I understand you correctly, you’re looking to have items created all at once for the upcoming months ahead, rather than having them be created month by month. Is that right?

If so, what would you think about duplicating the item 12 times say (for the next 12 months), and then just changing the date one by one?
